page.content: The table presents data on various variables with their corresponding hazard ratios (HR), 95% confidence intervals (95%CI), and p values. For the variable SNORA74B, the HR is 3.309 with a 95%CI of 1.257-8.709 and a p value of 0.015*, indicating statistical significance. Local invasion shows no HR value and no 95%CI, with a p value of 0.303. In contrast, local invasion (1) has an HR of 1.061, a 95%CI of 0.29-8.882, and a p value of 0.929, implying no significance. Local invasion (2) presents an HR of 0.35, a 95%CI of 0.32-3.809, and a p value of 0.389, again indicating no significance.

lines.text: The table presents data on various variables with their corresponding hazard ratios (HR), 95% confidence intervals (95%CI),
and p values. For the variable SNORA74B, the HR is 3.309 with a 95%CI of 1.257-8.709 and a p value of 0.015*, indicating
statistical significance. Local invasion shows no HR value and no 95%CI, with a p value of 0.303. In contrast, local invasion (1)
has an HR of 1.061, a 95%CI of 0.29-8.882, and a p value of 0.929, implying no significance. Local invasion (2) presents an
HR of 0.35, a 95%CI of 0.32-3.809, and a p value of 0.389, again indicating no significance.

page.content: For local invasion (3), the HR is 0.752 with a 95%CI of 0.66-8.634 and a p value of 0.819, confirming a lack of significance. The variable lymph node metastasis has an HR of 2.254, a 95%CI of 0.533-2.947, and a p value of 0.063, suggesting borderline significance. Distant metastasis shows an HR of 1.883, a 95%CI of 0.402-1.941, and a p value of 0.157, indicating no significance. The TNM variable has an HR of 3.236, a 95%CI of 0.403-25.958, and a p value of 0.026*, signifying statistical significance. The CA199 variable displays an HR of 3.762, a 95%CI of 0.531-26.642, and a p value of 0.185, showing no significance. Ki67 has an HR of 0.288, a 95%CI of 0.039-2.11, and a p value of 0.221, indicating no significance. Finally, PHLPP has an HR of 0.329, a 95%CI of 0.137-0.790, and a p value of 0.013*, denoting statistical significance.
